pi_items.source: Student record, enrollment codes, and school year are all created via SQL INSERT statements in setup_task.sh. No external data files or real datasets are used.

privileged_info_summary: The withdraw_student task is for OpenSIS v9.2, a verified open-source Student Information System (GitHub: OS4ED/openSIS-Classic), running on a LAMP stack with MariaDB. A synthetic student record for Maria Rodriguez (ID 990, grade 10, DOB 2009-05-22) is created during task setup with initial enrollment status (end_date=NULL, no drop code). The task requires the agent to withdraw this student by setting end_date to 2025-01-15 (ISO format) and selecting enrollment code 201 (Transferred) as the drop reason. Critical metadata verified: student_first_name='Maria', student_last_name='Rodriguez', target_drop_date='2025-01-15', target_drop_code_keyword='Transfer' (title='Transferred'), school_year_title='2024-2025'. Login credentials are admin / Admin@123. Database credentials are opensis_user / opensis_password_123. All test data is synthetically generated by setup scripts, not from real external sources. Verifier checks that end_date is set correctly and drop_code contains the 'Transfer' keyword.
